description: Style NoteOffering premium cushioning in a lightweight design, the nike Air Max Run Lite 3 shoe offers absolute support and breathable comfort to make your runs all the more fun. The welded plastic support at the midfoot and streamlined stability Air Sole unit with a foam pillar construction make this a perfect shoe for those runners who demand that extra stability and cushioning.Product DetailsHeavily meshed upper with strategically placed Flywire overlays for enhanced breathable comfortCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitCushioned tongue and collar for snug comfort and a padded footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protectionRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticPhylon midsole with a visible nike Air unit in the heel for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfortTPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs for optimal traction on various surfacesFlex grooves for ease of movementMaterial and CareMesh, syntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
